name: martix-tunit

publisher.name: MartiXDev
publisher.distributionModel: standalone skill with direct Copilot marketplace registration

summary: Standalone-first MartiX skill package for TUnit test authoring, parameterized data-driven tests, lifecycle hooks, parallel-by-default execution, async assertions, dependency injection, mocking, extensibility, and xUnit/NUnit/MSTest migration.
abstract: This package is the canonical source for the MartiX TUnit skill. It ships the authored rule library, reference maps, maintainer docs, templates, and taxonomy for TUnit on Microsoft.Testing.Platform across 7 domains.

status.scaffoldNote: The package is fully authored for its initial preview scope: 15 rule files, 10 reference files, maintainer docs, templates, taxonomy assets, and marketplace registration metadata are in place.

rulePrefixes.foundation: Installation, project shape, OutputType=Exe model, source generator, runner wiring, Microsoft.Testing.Platform integration, IDE configuration, and platform constraints
rulePrefixes.data: Parameterized tests, Arguments attribute, MethodDataSource, ClassDataSource, TestDataRow, matrix tests, combined data sources, nested data sources, generic attributes, and IDataSourceGeneratorAttribute
rulePrefixes.lifecycle: Before and After hooks at Test/Class/Assembly/TestSession/TestDiscovery scopes, BeforeEvery/AfterEvery, hook execution order, property injection, IAsyncInitializer, IAsyncDiscoveryInitializer, and dependency injection construction
rulePrefixes.assertions: Assert.That entry point, async assertion model, unawaited-assertion pitfall, value assertions, collection assertions, async and exception assertions, combining assertions, Assert.Multiple, member assertions, and custom assertion extensibility
rulePrefixes.execution: Parallel-by-default behavior, ParallelLimiter<T>, NotInParallel, DependsOn, test ordering, retries, repeats, timeouts, test filters, skip, explicit, CI/CD reporting, engine modes, and AOT constraints
rulePrefixes.mocking-extending: TUnit.Mocks beta library, mock setup and verification, argument matchers, ITestRegisteredEventReceiver, custom test attributes, data source generators, argument formatters, dynamic tests, and built-in extension points
rulePrefixes.migration: Behavioral differences from xUnit, NUnit, and MSTest, attribute equivalence, class and method lifecycle mapping, assertion API differences, and step-by-step migration guidance

notes: Use the standalone package as the source of truth for local installs and direct folder-based validation.
Prefer a direct folder path or direct GitHub tree URL because skills is not a documented repo-root discovery location.

secondarySurface.strategy: register the canonical standalone package directly from skills

discovery.sameNameConflictRisk: A standalone project or personal install can shadow a future plugin-delivered copy with the same skill name.
discovery.recommendedValidationApproach: Use a clean environment or remove the standalone install before validating any future marketplace wrapper.

local.role: stable six-section contract that every TUnit rule file must follow
starter scaffold for authoring new TUnit rule files
approved source index, precedence rules, and exclusion guardrails for all TUnit rule authoring
maintainer memo showing which ideas from the legacy csharp-tunit seed skill were reused, corrected, or intentionally rejected
entry map for installation, project shape, runner wiring, and execution model guidance
entry map for parameterized data sources, matrix tests, and generator patterns
entry map for hooks, hook execution order, property injection, and DI construction
entry map for assertion API, async model, assertion chains, and custom assertion authoring
entry map for parallelism, execution control, retries, timeouts, and CI reporting
entry map for TUnit.Mocks beta usage and extension point authoring
full attribute equivalence table for xUnit, NUnit, and MSTest migration to TUnit
secondary recipe index linking advanced integration scenarios, ASP.NET, Aspire, Playwright, and benchmarks
research memo scaffold for expanding TUnit workstreams
machine-readable domain taxonomy, rule prefixes, and planned workstream grouping
stable section and domain ordering for rule authoring and discovery

external.title: GitHub Copilot CLI create skills documentation
